title: fix(git): handle merge commits in compact diff
description:
Fix handling of merge commits in `compact_diff`. Previously, merge commits were being skipped entirely which lost context.

### Test Plan
- [x] Unit tests added
- [x] Manual verification with merge-heavy repos

title: feat(aws): add AWS CLI module with token-optimized output
description:
Add AWS CLI support.

![architecture](https://example.com/arch.png)

## Commands
- `rtk aws s3 ls`
- `rtk aws ec2 describe-instances`
- `rtk aws ecs list-services`

## Token Savings
| Command | Savings |
|---------|--------|
| s3 ls | 75% |
| ec2 describe | 85% |
| ecs list | 80% |

title: feat(tee): save raw output on failure for LLM re-read
description:
## Tee Output Recovery

Save raw unfiltered output on command failure.
Print one-line hint so LLMs can re-read instead of re-run.

### Configuration
```toml
[tee]
enabled = true
dir = "~/.local/share/rtk/tee"
max_files = 20
max_size = 1048576
```

title: ci: add ARM64 Linux build to release workflow
description:
Add ARM64 Linux target to the release workflow.

- Uses `cross` for cross-compilation
- Generates `.deb` and `.rpm` packages
- Tested on Raspberry Pi 4 and AWS Graviton

title: fix(vitest): handle watch mode output gracefully
description:
When vitest runs in watch mode, output is continuous and doesn't have a clear end marker. This fix detects watch mode and falls back to passthrough.

<!-- TODO: add unit test -->

title: feat(discover): add rtk discover command for missed savings analysis
description:
Add `rtk discover` command that scans Claude Code JSONL sessions and reports missed savings opportunities.

## Features
- Classifies commands as Supported/Unsupported/Ignored
- Groups by category with estimated token savings
- Reports top missed commands

## Example
```
$ rtk discover
Analyzed 1,234 commands across 45 sessions

Missed savings by category:
  Git: 234 commands, ~16,800 tokens
  Cargo: 89 commands, ~7,120 tokens
```
